method.prosco: ProSco(x) = 100 × (1 − cum_mass_in_higher_density_bins(x)). Per cell: weighted KDE (Gaussian, bandwidth × 1.5), equal-width bins over [data_min − 1×range, data_max + 1×range]. n_bins per cell = ⌈2 × support_range / bandwidth⌉ clamped to [50, 2048] (Nyquist sampling rate; smallest discretisation that resolves smoothing-scale features). Per Černý et al. 2026 (NAR gkaf1335).
method.weighting: Per-PDB downweighting: each observation weight = 1 / (same-PDB count in cell). n_effective ≤ number of distinct PDBs in the cell.
